level.title: Set Up Base
level.subdescription: Your Minion is smart but forgetful. Every new chat - blank slate. No memory. No context. Back to square one. It is time to build your Minion a permanent base - so they are always briefed, always ready, and never starting from scratch.

mission_targets: Create a Claude Project - your Minion's permanent organized workspace
Load context into that Project - so your Minion knows your world without being told every time
Run prompts without repeating yourself - ever again
mission_check: Project created and named after my Minion
Mission data uploaded to the Project
Met my Minion and confirmed they remember everything
Q1: Best month for the heist identified
Q2: Ship type and company selected
Special tool invented for the mission

mission_gear.name: Projects
mission_gear.definition: A permanent workspace in Claude that saves your instructions and files - so every new chat starts with your Minion already briefed.
mission_gear.theme_translation: Think of it as Gru's Lair. Without it - Gru would have to rebuild the entire operation from scratch every single morning. With it - everything is in place, ready to go, every time.
why_useful: Your Minion remembers who they are and what they know
You never re-explain yourself across chats
Everything stays organized in one place
Your instructions are reusable - set once, works forever

mission_gear.name: Context
mission_gear.definition: The background information you load into your Project - files, data, and instructions that tell your Minion everything they need to know about your world and your goals.
mission_gear.theme_translation: Before any great heist, Gru briefs the team - here is the target, here is the plan, here is what we know. Context is that briefing. Loaded once. Available always.
why_useful: Your Minion gives specific answers - not generic ones
Responses are grounded in your actual situation
The more context you load - the smarter your Minion gets
Files, data, and instructions all count as context
